allow: PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); $p = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "node: $\($n.Source\)"; if\($n\){ node --version }; "npm: $\($p.Source\)"; if\($p\){ npm --version })

PowerShell("winget: " + \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "choco: " + \(Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "python: " + \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "py: " + \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "node path: $node"; if\($node\){ node --version; npm --version })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Aman_prod\\Epi\\viewer"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($r.Content -match 'id="root"'\){ "root div: present" }; $m = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/main.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "main.jsx status: $\($m.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Aman_prod\\Epi\\viewer"; npm install mermaid --no-fund --no-audit 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Aman_prod\\Epi\\viewer"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8)
